pi_items.source: Hardcoded in setup_task.sh, export_result.sh, and verifier.py as the required GPX export path.
Explicitly requested in the task description and queried exactly in the VLM prompt within verifier.py.
Matches the explicit instructions in the task description and verifier expectations.
Matches the default fallback value defined in verifier.py.
Coordinates verified via OpenStreetMap Nominatim API mapping to the real Middlesex Fells Reservation in Massachusetts.

privileged_info_summary: Verified that the task requires creating a BaseCamp list named "Fall Survey 2024" containing exactly two real-world waypoints: "Oak Stand A" (42.4505, -71.1085) and "Wetland Plot B" (42.4512, -71.1062), situated in the Middlesex Fells Reservation, MA. The export path "C:\workspace\output\fall_survey_2024.gpx" is hardcoded in the setup and verifier scripts, and the 0.005 degree coordinate tolerance is aligned with the default in verifier.py. The underlying topographic database data is not synthetic.
